Package martin.viewtool.core

package martin.viewtool.core
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description

    martin.viewtool.core.io
     
    martin.viewtool.config

  • Class
    Description
    DownloadController
    Coordinates validation and execution of media downloads via YtDlpService.
    DownloadRequest
    Holds all parameters needed to start a yt-dlp download.
    LibraryService
    Service that provides access to local media files through a MediaLibrary.
    ManagementService
    Service that handles operations on media files: listing, deleting, downloading from the network, uploading, and opening locally.
    Media
     
    MediaFormat
    Supported media output formats for downloads.
    MediaItem
    Immutable representation of a local media file on disk.
    MediaLibrary
    Scans a local directory and builds a list of MediaItem objects.
    MediaRowRenderer
     
    MediaService
    Manages the in-memory list of network media and provides utilities for resolving local file paths and combining local and network media lists.
    MediaTableModel
    Table model that combines network media from the API and local files.
    PlayService
    Opens the most recently downloaded media file with the system default player.
    TokenService
    Persists and retrieves the authentication token (datos/token_txt.txt).
    Usuari
    Represents a user returned by the remote API.
    ValidationService
    Utility class with validation methods.
    YtDlpService
    Wraps the yt-dlp command-line tool to download audio and video.
